ORDER DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT STEVEN J. BRATTESANI'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. CLAIMANT IS A JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO THE AMENDED JUDGMENT ISSUED ON JANUARY 10, 2012. ON SEPTEMBER 17, 2013, THE COURT ISSUED AN ORDER ADDING STEVEN J. BRATTESANI, D.D.S., AS AN INDIVIDUAL, AS A JUDGMENT DEBTOR. CLAIMANT HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED THAT HE NEEDS THE LEVIED FUNDS FROM WELLS FARGO BANK IN THE AMOUNT OF $ 105.57 FOR THE SUPPORT OF CLAIMANT AND HIS DEPENDENTS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-04-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT STEVEN J. BRATTESANI'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS Denied. Claimant is a judgment debtor to the Amended Judgment issued on January 10, 2012. On September 17, 2013, the Court issued an order adding Steven J. Brattesani, D.D.S., as an individual, as a judgment debtor. Claimant has not demonstrated that he needs the levied funds from Wells Fargo Bank in the amount of $ 105.57 for the support of Claimant and his dependents. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/EHG
